name: gitops-engine
description: GitLab self-hosted and Harbor artifact registry — the core GitOps engine. These are the foundations for the autarky (vendor) system and CI/CD pipeline.
sprintGoal: A running self-hosted GitLab and Harbor registry on the cluster, both secured by Keycloak SSO and using Ceph for storage — enabling the platform to host its own source code and container images.

stories.title: Helm chart: GitLab self-hosted
stories.description: Create charts/gitlab/ wrapping gitlab/gitlab with opinionated values: external object storage pointing to Ceph (MinIO-compatible), PostgreSQL via Crossplane, Redis via Crossplane, Keycloak OIDC auth, GitLab Runner pre-configured. Ingress at gitlab.{{ .Values.global.domain }}. Registry at registry.{{ .Values.global.domain }}. Initial admin credentials from Sealed Secret. ArgoCD app in argocd-apps/platform/.
acceptanceCriteria: charts/gitlab/ uses Ceph object storage for artifacts/uploads/packages
Keycloak OIDC configured as auth provider
GitLab Runner pre-configured with Kubernetes executor
Ingress uses global.domain for all GitLab subdomains
Initial root password from Sealed Secret
stories.testPlan: helm dependency update charts/gitlab/ && helm lint charts/gitlab/; helm template charts/gitlab/ | grep -c 'kind:'; verify gitlab-app.yaml exists and is valid YAML; verify values.yaml has global.domain references and ceph storage config.

smart.notes: Measurable 4: Ceph storage and Keycloak OIDC ACs are verifiable via helm template grep but cannot be live-tested without a cluster. Achievable 4: gitlab chart is complex (many sub-components) but wrapper pattern is well-established.

stories.notes: gitlab/gitlab 8.5.0 wrapper. Ceph S3, Keycloak OIDC, Runner k8s executor. PR #6 merged with green CI (14 jobs).

stories.title: Helm chart: Harbor artifact registry
stories.description: Create charts/harbor/ wrapping goharbor/harbor. Storage backend: Ceph S3-compatible (ceph-bucket StorageClass). Keycloak OIDC auth. Trivy scanner integration (internal). Ingress at registry.{{ .Values.global.domain }} (or harbor.{{ .Values.global.domain }} for UI). Replication rules stub for syncing public images. ArgoCD app in argocd-apps/platform/.
stories.testPlan: helm dependency update charts/harbor/ && helm lint charts/harbor/; helm template charts/harbor/ | grep -q 'kind: Deployment'; verify harbor-app.yaml exists; verify values.yaml references global.domain and ceph storage.

smart.notes: Measurable 4: Ceph storage and Keycloak OIDC ACs are config-verifiable but not live-testable without a cluster.
